crm.activity_summary_desc: Summary of recent member activity across your community
crm.activity_timeline_desc: Chronological timeline of member actions and coordinator interactions
crm.crm_dashboard_desc: Overview of member engagement, tasks, tags, and onboarding progress
crm.delete_note_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This cannot be undone.
crm.delete_task_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This cannot be undone.
crm.biggest_dropoff_help: This is the point in the journey where the highest number of members stop before reaching the next stage.
crm.failed_to_load_c_r_m_dashboard_data: Failed to load CRM dashboard data
crm.failed_to_load_onboarding_funnel_data: Failed to load onboarding funnel data
crm.funnel_summary_desc: A short readout of what the funnel is saying right now, before you dive into the detail below.
crm.funnel_summary_title: What This Funnel Says Right Now
crm.funnel_focus_desc: The handoffs most likely to benefit from coordinator attention right now.
crm.guide_conversion_body: Each conversion percentage compares a stage only to the stage immediately before it, not to the original starting group.
crm.guide_dropoff_body: Drop-off counts show how many members were lost before reaching the next step, helping you spot where follow-up may matter most.
crm.guide_stage_width_body: Wider stage bars mean more members from the original entry group are still active at that point in the journey.
crm.how_to_read_desc: A quick reference so the bars, percentages, and drop-off panels are easier to interpret at a glance.
crm.member_funnel_help: Each stage bar shows how much of the original entry group is still present. The badge on the bar shows share of entrants for the first stage, then conversion from the previous stage for each later step.
crm.member_funnel_desc: A stage-by-stage view of how many entrants are still moving toward first exchange.
crm.members_lost_at_step: {{count}} members are lost at this step.
crm.member_notes_desc: Add, view, and manage private coordinator notes for this member
crm.member_tags_desc: Tag members to categorise them for filtering and outreach
crm.members_active_vs_total: Active approved members vs total approved members
crm.members_logged_in_recently: Members active in the last 30 days
crm.monthly_registrations_desc: Recent registration volume with month-over-month context.
crm.monthly_registrations_help: Use this trend to tell whether funnel changes are coming from weaker conversion, lower incoming registrations, or both at the same time.
crm.no_activity_hint_default: No activity has been recorded yet
crm.no_activity_hint_filtered: No activity matches your current filters
crm.no_notes_hint_default: No notes have been added yet. Add one above.
crm.no_notes_hint_filtered: No notes match your current filters
crm.no_tags_hint_default: No tags have been created yet
crm.no_tasks_hint_default: No tasks have been created yet. Create one above.
crm.no_tasks_hint_filtered: No tasks match your current filters
crm.onboarding_funnel_desc: Track where members stall between registration and meaningful participation so follow-up work lands where it matters.
crm.placeholder_type_name_or_email: Type a name or email to search...
crm.placeholder_type_a_tag_name_or_select_fr: Type a Tag Name or Select from Suggestions...
crm.placeholder_write_your_note_about_this_m: Write Your Note About This Member...
crm.quick_actions_desc: Common actions for managing members from the CRM dashboard
crm.reading_guide_desc: A quick reference so the bars, percentages, and drop-off panels are easier to interpret at a glance.
crm.remove_tag_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this tag from all members?
crm.remove_tag_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this tag from this member?
crm.stage_conversion_desc: Stage-by-stage handoff quality across the full onboarding journey.
crm.stage_conversion_help: These cards compare each stage directly to the next one. A weaker percentage here usually means the next action, approval, or reminder needs attention.
crm.stage_health_desc: Volume and conversion strength for every stage in one glance.
crm.stage_health_help: Share of entrants tells you how much of the original cohort remains. Conversion from previous stage tells you how efficiently members move through the immediate handoff.
crm.snapshot_conversion_body: {{members}} members currently reach {{stage}} from the first recorded stage.
crm.snapshot_desc: A short readout of what the funnel is saying right now, before you dive into the detail below.
crm.snapshot_priority_body: {{loss}} members are lost at this handoff, and {{rate}} make it through to the next step.
crm.snapshot_title: What This Funnel Says Right Now
crm.valid_user_id_required: A valid user ID is required
crm.transition_health_desc: Volume and conversion strength for every stage in one glance.
crm.transition_health_help: Share of entrants tells you how much of the original cohort remains. Conversion from previous stage tells you how efficiently members move through the immediate handoff.
crm.transition_loss_detail: {{members}} members are lost at this step.
crm.valid_user_i_d_is_required: A valid user ID is required
crm.weakest_handoff_help: This is the lowest stage-to-stage conversion rate in the current funnel, even if another stage has a larger raw loss count.
crm.overall_conversion_help: This is the percentage of members who make it from the first recorded stage all the way to the final stage shown on this page.
